# Lix — Capability Profile

## Use Case Coverage

| Use Case | Rating | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| [[prospecting]] | ✓ | Chrome extension exports LinkedIn search results to CSV/Excel with enriched data; 98% accuracy claimed; up to 10,000 exports/day; API (Realtime — LinkedIn profile data, org data) |
| [[email-verification]] | △ | 98% validated during extraction; no standalone verification tool |
| [[email-warmup]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[personalisation]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[campaign-sequence]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[inbox-reply-management]] | — | Not applicable |

## Vendor Type
Point solution: LinkedIn bulk export specialist. Credits charged only for valid emails (1 credit = 1 valid email).

## Best For
Teams who need to quickly bulk-export LinkedIn search results with emails into a spreadsheet. Particularly good for large-scale list building directly from LinkedIn searches.

## Limitations
- Extraction and export only — no sending, warm-up, or inbox
- Verification is inline (not standalone) — cannot verify existing lists
- Must pair with a sequencer for outreach
